name: Brick
description: SEA open banking API platform — access to bank accounts, e-wallets and alternative financial data for fintechs.

seo.title: Brick — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Brick: SEA open banking API platform — access to bank accounts, e-wallets and alternative financial data for fintechs.

when_to_use: Open banking data access across SEA banks and e-wallets
Account verification for SEA fintech and lending apps
Aggregating transaction data for alternative credit scoring
Payment initiation from bank accounts for merchant checkout
Building financial management tools for Indonesian consumers

pros: Fast KYC and account linking flows
Regional focus avoids thin coverage elsewhere
cons: Regulatory clarity varies across SEA markets
Bank connector stability a known challenge
Smaller team than Finverse or Finantier competitors
Documentation less polished than Western APIs
review.verdict: Useful SEA open banking option for Indonesia-focused fintechs, but coverage gaps persist.
review.best_for: Indonesia and SEA fintechs needing bank plus e-wallet access
review.not_for: Teams operating outside SEA or needing enterprise-grade SLAs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
